title: EDIF port endianness trouble
body:
I just noticed after importing that the mcu_addrX bits got wired in reverse. 
changing the port decl to:
```
          (port (array (rename mcu_addrX "mcu_addrX[0:23]") 24) (direction INPUT))
```
fixes the thing, although the mcu_addrX is declared as 
```
input  [23:0] mcu_addrX,
```
in the verilog file.
unfortunately I can't tell which is in error the write_edif or 
IDS. when researching this the only vaguely similar thing I came across was:
https://www.xilinx.com/support/answers/5416.html
unfortunately there's no hint there which bit a
```
            (portRef (member mcu_addrX 1))
```
is supposed to connect to...
(there's at least two interpretations for this that I can think of)
